products.title: EWM Pallet Verification Agent
products.shortDescription: AI-powered pallet verification agent for SAP EWM outbound loading — detects HU labels via vision AI and cross-references against live EWM delivery data.

packages.title: EWM Pallet Verification Agent Package
packages.shortDescription: Package for EWM Pallet Verification Agent and related resources
packages.description: AI-powered pallet verification agent for SAP EWM outbound loading — detects HU labels via vision AI and cross-references against live EWM delivery data.

consumptionBundles.title: EWM Pallet Verification Agent API
consumptionBundles.shortDescription: Consumption bundle for EWM Pallet Verification Agent A2A API
consumptionBundles.description: This consumption bundle provides access to the EWM Pallet Verification Agent via the A2A protocol.

agents.title: EWM Pallet Verification Agent
agents.shortDescription: AI-powered pallet verification agent for SAP EWM outbound loading — detects HU labels via vision AI and cross-references against live EWM delivery data.
agents.description: The EWM Pallet Verification Agent automates outbound loading checks in SAP warehouse operations by analysing pallet photos with vision AI, cross-referencing detected handling unit labels against live SAP EWM delivery data, and automatically blocking deliveries when discrepancies or label issues are found.

apiResources.title: EWM Pallet Verification Agent A2A API
apiResources.shortDescription: A2A API for interacting with the EWM Pallet Verification Agent
apiResources.description: Agent-to-Agent (A2A) protocol API that enables interaction with the EWM Pallet Verification Agent for pallet photo analysis and EWM delivery cross-referencing.

integrationDependencies.title: SAP AI Core Inference API
integrationDependencies.shortDescription: Multimodal LLM inference service for vision AI and NLP
integrationDependencies.description: Multimodal LLM inference service used for HU label detection, OCR, and barcode extraction from pallet photos.

aspects.title: Vision AI Inference
aspects.description: Access to multimodal LLM via SAP AI Core for pallet photo analysis

integrationDependencies.title: SAP EWM Warehouse Outbound Delivery Order API
integrationDependencies.shortDescription: OData API for fetching outbound delivery and HU data from SAP EWM
integrationDependencies.description: OData API used to retrieve outbound delivery headers, items, and assigned handling units from SAP S/4HANA Extended Warehouse Management.

aspects.title: Outbound Delivery Data Access
aspects.description: Read access to EWM outbound delivery orders and assigned HU lists

integrationDependencies.title: SAP EWM Handling Unit API
integrationDependencies.shortDescription: OData API for handling unit detail lookup and delivery assignment
integrationDependencies.description: OData API used to retrieve handling unit contents, packing materials, and delivery assignments from SAP S/4HANA EWM for barcode-based HU resolution.

aspects.title: Handling Unit Lookup
aspects.description: Read access to EWM handling unit details for SSCC barcode resolution
